name: campaign_channel
short_description: The marketing channel through which the campaign was delivered to customers
reason_for_inclusion: Essential for comparing channel performance in bar charts and stacked bar charts

name: product_category
short_description: The product category being marketed in the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Enables product-level analysis in bar charts and heatmaps when crossed with region or channel

name: region
short_description: Geographic region where the campaign was targeted
reason_for_inclusion: Useful for geographic comparisons in bar charts and heatmaps showing regional performance differences

name: customer_segment
short_description: Customer lifecycle segment classification based on recency, frequency, and monetary value
reason_for_inclusion: Critical for segment analysis in grouped bar charts and box plots of revenue or engagement by segment

name: device_type
short_description: The type of device used when the customer interacted with the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Enables device-based comparisons in bar charts and stacked bar charts across channels

name: day_of_week
short_description: Day of the week when the campaign interaction occurred
reason_for_inclusion: Reveals weekly patterns in line charts and bar charts for identifying high-engagement days

name: month
short_description: Calendar month of the campaign interaction
reason_for_inclusion: Captures seasonal trends in line charts and heatmaps showing monthly performance patterns
category_names: January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, December

name: quarter
short_description: Fiscal quarter of the campaign interaction
reason_for_inclusion: Useful for high-level time trends in line charts and grouped bar charts comparing quarterly performance

name: conversion_flag
short_description: Indicates whether the campaign interaction resulted in a conversion or purchase
reason_for_inclusion: Provides binary outcome for conversion rate visualizations and pie charts showing conversion proportion

name: year
short_description: Calendar year of the campaign interaction
reason_for_inclusion: Enables year-over-year trend analysis in line charts and multi-year comparisons in bar charts

name: ad_spend
short_description: Total monetary amount spent on the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Key input variable for scatter plots against revenue or conversions to analyze ROI and marketing efficiency

name: revenue
short_description: Total revenue generated from the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Primary outcome metric for scatter plots against ad_spend, box plots by segment, and line charts over time

name: customer_lifetime_value
short_description: Predicted total value a customer will generate over their entire relationship with the company
reason_for_inclusion: Important for customer value analysis in histograms and box plots across segments, and scatter plots vs engagement

name: click_through_rate
short_description: Proportion of impressions that resulted in a click, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1
reason_for_inclusion: Standard engagement metric for histograms showing rate distributions and scatter plots against conversion rate

name: engagement_score
short_description: Composite score measuring depth of customer engagement with the campaign (0 to 100)
reason_for_inclusion: Versatile metric for histograms, scatter plots against revenue, and color-mapped heatmaps

name: avg_order_value
short_description: Average monetary value of orders placed through the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Useful for scatter plots against ad_spend and box plots by product category to compare spending behavior

name: impressions
short_description: Number of times the campaign content was displayed to users
reason_for_inclusion: Top-of-funnel metric for scatter plots against clicks, line charts over time, and funnel visualizations

name: clicks
short_description: Number of clicks received by the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Mid-funnel engagement metric for scatter plots against impressions and conversions, and funnel analysis

name: conversions
short_description: Number of completed desired actions (purchases, sign-ups) attributed to the campaign
reason_for_inclusion: Bottom-of-funnel outcome metric for scatter plots against clicks, bar charts by channel, and line trends

name: week_number
short_description: Week number since the start of the observation period (1 to 104 representing two years)
reason_for_inclusion: Continuous time variable enabling line charts and area charts showing trends in key metrics over two years
